content: Curiosity intrinsic reward modules like ICM in autonomous agents can be repurposed as a dynamic pruning and prioritization gate for long-term agent memory in 2024-2025 SOTA active learning agents, where only memory traces that trigger sustained prediction error (the same signal that drives curiosity) are retained and prioritized for recall during active task sampling. This turns the agent's own exploratory drive into a built-in, context-aware memory curation system that requires no external labeled data for memory optimization.
